senses.gloss: instance noun of صَاح (ṣāḥ): an instance of yelling; a yell, a shout, a scream

examples.text: يَحْسَبُونَ كُلَّ صَيْحَةٍ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ هُمُ الْعَدُوُّ فَاحْذَرْهُمْ
examples.english: They think every cry is against them. They are the enemy, so beware of them.

senses.gloss: a type of punishment mentioned in the Quran.

examples.text: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً فَكَانُوا كَهَشِيمِ الْمُحْتَظِرِ
examples.english: Indeed, We sent against them ˹only˺ one ˹mighty˺ blast, leaving them like the twigs of fence-builders.

etymology.text: Instance noun from the verb صَاح (ṣāḥ)

body.text: an inf. n. [and also an inf. n. un.] of
wait not for, aught but the like of the cryingout,
mischief, that shall come upon them suddenly.
predatory, incursion, by which the tribe are surprised.
